problem: Why do amyloid plaques form in Alzheimer's and can they be cleared?
mechanism: Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier
hypothesis: If Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier is applied to they, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 15 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
